CustomField.description: Determines whether the quote line represents a partial term. Created w.r.t BIZ-72051 BIZ-77435 - added bundle product skip logic Updated: Added segment index = 1 condition and changed date mismatch result to TRUE
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( RIGHT(SBQQ__ProductCode__c, 2) <> "-P", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionType__c) = "Renewable", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionPricing__c) = "Fixed Price", NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__Product__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c)), SBQQ__SegmentIndex__c = 1 ), IF( SBQQ__EndDate__c <> ( ADDMONTHS(SBQQ__StartDate__c,SBQQ__Quote__r.First_Segment_Months__c)-1 ), TRUE, FALSE ), FALSE )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked (TRUE) when segment index = 1 and End Date is not equal to (Start Date + First Segment Months − 1 day) from the related Quote.
CustomField.label: Is Partial Month?
